approvalSource: Steve asked to build the reviewed GLS Scoreboard V1 plan, approved the final review pass with go for it, and asked for a full closeout.
notes: Approval applies only to GLS Scoreboard V1 closeout: current active pipeline, total outcomes, GLS Manager, grouped case behavior, history visibility, source freshness, backlog follow-up capture, and proof gates. It does not approve CRM, agent coach, GBS, Strategy, Scoper, broad source expansion, production auto-send, or unrelated work.
